findings.description: David Miller's signature block is duplicated: the signature image contains 'Sincerely,' plus the handwritten signature plus 'David Miller, PE / State Mining Engineer' as printed text, and those same elements are also rendered as separate HTML text immediately below the image.
findings.evidence: PDF shows one 'Sincerely,' followed by signature and typed name/title. HTML shows 'Sincerely,' as text, then an image containing 'Sincerely,' + signature + 'David Miller, PE / State Mining Engineer', then 'David Miller, PE' and 'State Mining Engineer' repeated again as HTML text.

findings.description: Brian Wrenn's signature block is duplicated: the signature image includes 'Brian Wrenn,' text and surrounding context text fragments ('t and General Counsel, Department of Enviro…', 'aleigh, NC 27699-1601.'), and those items are also rendered as HTML text alongside the image.
findings.evidence: PDF shows Brian Wrenn's signature once with typed name/title below. HTML shows a signature image containing 'Brian Wrenn,' plus surrounding text fragments, then 'Brian Wrenn,' / 'Director' / 'Division of Energy, Mineral, and Land Resources' / 'North Carolina Department of Environmental Quality' repeated as HTML text.

findings.description: Brenda Harris's signature block is duplicated: the signature image includes handwritten date '12-15-2020', signature, and 'Brenda Harris / Mining Program Administrative Assistant' text, and those items are also rendered as HTML text below the image.
findings.evidence: PDF shows handwritten mailing date, Brenda Harris signature, and printed name/title once. HTML shows image containing these plus 'Brenda Harris' and 'Mining Program Administrative Assistant' repeated as separate HTML text.
